description: Create a production die-line for a 60mm x 60mm x 100mm packaging box in LibreCAD using millimeters. The drawing must feature two layers: 'CUT' (Red, Continuous) for cut lines and 'FOLD' (Blue, Dashed) for crease lines. The box net requires four 60mm x 100mm main panels, top and bottom flaps extending 30mm from the body, and a 15mm wide glue tab with chamfered corners on the right side of the fourth panel. Ensure the bottom-left corner of the first panel is positioned at coordinates (0,0). Save the file to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/box_dieline.dxf.
